streams.external_stream_gps: CREATE STREAM external_stream_gps () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/gps", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="external_nanomq", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.external_stream_speed: CREATE STREAM external_stream_speed () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/speed", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="external_nanomq", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.external_stream_weight: CREATE STREAM external_stream_weight () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/weight", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="external_nanomq", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.external_stream_fuel: CREATE STREAM external_stream_fuel () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/fuel", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="external_nanomq", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.local_stream_gps_ds: CREATE STREAM local_stream_gps_ds () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/gps/raw", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="local_ds", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.local_stream_speed_ds: CREATE STREAM local_stream_speed_ds () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/speed/raw", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="local_ds", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.local_stream_weight_ds: CREATE STREAM local_stream_weight_ds () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/weight/raw", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="local_ds", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.local_stream_fuel_ds: CREATE STREAM local_stream_fuel_ds () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/fuel/raw", FORMAT="json", CONF_KEY="local_ds", TYPE="mqtt", SHARED="false");
streams.speed_downsampled: CREATE STREAM speed_downsampled () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/speed/ds", FORMAT="json", TYPE="mqtt", CONF_KEY="local_ds", SHARED="false");
streams.weight_downsampled: CREATE STREAM weight_downsampled () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/weight/ds", FORMAT="json", TYPE="mqtt", CONF_KEY="local_ds", SHARED="false");
streams.fuel_downsampled: CREATE STREAM fuel_downsampled () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/fuel/ds", FORMAT="json", TYPE="mqtt", CONF_KEY="local_ds", SHARED="false");
streams.gps_downsampled: CREATE STREAM gps_downsampled () WITH (DATASOURCE="truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/gps/ds", FORMAT="json", TYPE="mqtt", CONF_KEY="local_ds", SHARED="false");
streams.mqtt_stream: CREATE STREAM mqtt_stream () WITH (DATASOURCE="#", FORMAT="json", TYPE="mqtt", CONF_KEY="local_ds", SHARED="false");
streams.simulator_stream: CREATE STREAM simulator_stream () WITH (FORMAT="json", TYPE="simulator", CONF_KEY="default", SHARED="false");

rules.rule_downsample_gps: {"actions":[{"mqtt":{"qos":0,"sendSingle":true,"server":"tcp://nanomq:1883","topic":"truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/gps/ds"}}],"id":"rule_downsample_gps","options":{"restartStrategy":{}},"sql":"SELECT * FROM local_stream_gps_ds WHERE abs(data-\u003elat - lag(data-\u003elat, 1, data-\u003elat)) \u003e 0.000001 OR abs(data-\u003elon - lag(data-\u003elon, 1, data-\u003elon)) \u003e 0.000001","triggered":true}
rules.rule_speed_events: {  "id": "rule_speed_events",  "sql": "SELECT metadata->timestamp as timestamp, metadata->bort as vehicle_id, 'speed' as sensor_type, AVG(data->speed) as avg_speed, CASE WHEN AVG(data->speed) > 0 THEN 'moving' ELSE 'stopped' END as status FROM speed_downsampled GROUP BY TUMBLINGWINDOW(ss, 1)",  "actions": [{    "mqtt": {      "server": "tcp://nanomq:1883",      "topic": "truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/speed/events",      "qos": 0,      "sendSingle": true,      "dataTemplate": "{\"metadata\":{\"vehicle_id\":\"{{.vehicle_id}}\",\"sensor_type\":\"{{.sensor_type}}\",\"timestamp\":{{.timestamp}}},\"data\":{\"status\":\"{{.status}}\",\"value\":{{.avg_speed}}}}"    }  }]}
rules.rule_weight_events: {  "id": "rule_weight_events",  "sql": "SELECT metadata->timestamp as timestamp, metadata->bort as vehicle_id, 'weight' as sensor_type, AVG(data->weight) as avg_weight, CASE WHEN AVG(data->weight) > 5.0 THEN 'loaded' ELSE 'empty' END as status FROM weight_downsampled GROUP BY TUMBLINGWINDOW(ss, 1)",  "actions": [{    "mqtt": {      "server": "tcp://nanomq:1883",      "topic": "truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/weight/events",      "qos": 0,      "sendSingle": true,      "dataTemplate": "{\"metadata\":{\"vehicle_id\":\"{{.vehicle_id}}\",\"sensor_type\":\"{{.sensor_type}}\",\"timestamp\":{{.timestamp}}},\"data\":{\"status\":\"{{.status}}\",\"value\":{{.avg_weight}}}}"    }  }]}
rules.rule_fuel_events: {  "id": "rule_fuel_events",  "sql": "SELECT metadata->timestamp as timestamp, metadata->bort as vehicle_id, 'fuel' as sensor_type, data->fuel as fuel_value, CASE WHEN data->fuel > lag(data->fuel, 1, data->fuel) THEN 'refueling' WHEN data->fuel < lag(data->fuel, 1, data->fuel) THEN 'consumption' ELSE 'idle' END as status FROM local_stream_fuel_ds GROUP BY TUMBLINGWINDOW(ss, 1)",  "actions": [{    "mqtt": {      "server": "tcp://nanomq:1883",      "topic": "truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/fuel/events",      "qos": 0,      "sendSingle": true,      "dataTemplate": "{\"metadata\":{\"vehicle_id\":\"{{.vehicle_id}}\",\"sensor_type\":\"{{.sensor_type}}\",\"timestamp\":{{.timestamp}}},\"data\":{\"status\":\"{{.status}}\",\"value\":{{.fuel_value}}}}"    }  }]}
rules.rule_wifi_fake_events_on: {  "id": "rule_wifi_fake_events_on",  "sql": "SELECT to_seconds(now()) as timestamp, 'wifi' as sensor_type, 'on' as status, true as value FROM simulator_stream",  "actions": [{    "mqtt": {      "server": "tcp://nanomq:1883",      "topic": "truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/wifi/fake_events",      "qos": 0,      "sendSingle": true,      "dataTemplate": "{\"metadata\":{\"sensor_type\":\"{{.sensor_type}}\",\"timestamp\":{{.timestamp}}},\"data\":{\"status\":\"{{.status}}\",\"value\":{{.value}}}}"    }  }],  "triggered": false}
rules.rule_wifi_fake_events_off: {  "id": "rule_wifi_fake_events_off",  "sql": "SELECT to_seconds(now()) as timestamp, 'wifi' as sensor_type, 'off' as status, false as value FROM simulator_stream",  "actions": [{    "mqtt": {      "server": "tcp://nanomq:1883",      "topic": "truck/VEHICLE_ID_PLACEHOLDER/sensor/wifi/fake_events",      "qos": 0,      "sendSingle": true,      "dataTemplate": "{\"metadata\":{\"sensor_type\":\"{{.sensor_type}}\",\"timestamp\":{{.timestamp}}},\"data\":{\"status\":\"{{.status}}\",\"value\":{{.value}}}}"    }  }],  "triggered": false}
